The State maintains that the detenue was handled in accordance with procedure and that all formal steps were taken before the remand application was moved.

The reply asserts that the arrest memo extract records apprehension at 18:00 on 14 March 2026, that a relative was informed at 18:30, and that counsel was offered before production on 15 March 2026.

The State says the remand sheet reflects compliance and that any delay in securing counsel did not prejudice the subsequent proceedings.
